rationale.R1.3: The agent output does not accurately reflect the load-bearing claim-evidence linkage in the paragraph.
rationale.R1.6: The writing polish is lacking, with some minor improvements but no thorough copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is incomplete, as the text does not clearly mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is poor, as the output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is lacking, as the output introduces new errors and misinterpretations of the Conforti-Cornuéjols bound.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are incomplete, as the text does not clearly annotate sources and reasons for non-cosmetic changes.
